title: AI operations copilot for small clinics
summary: A privacy-aware assistant that helps independent clinics organize appointments, follow-ups, stock alerts, routine reports, and administrative workflows without replacing clinical judgment.
lookingFor: Clinic pilot partners and healthcare operations specialists

title: Regional supplier discovery network
summary: A verified directory and request workflow that helps growing businesses identify suitable local suppliers, compare capabilities, and create transparent introductions across nearby markets.
lookingFor: Procurement experts, supplier networks, and marketplace builders

title: Skills-to-project learning studio
summary: A practical education platform where learners build portfolio projects for real community initiatives while mentors assess applied skills, communication, reliability, and improvement over time.
lookingFor: Education partners, mentors, and early learner cohorts

title: Shared logistics capacity exchange
summary: A coordination layer for small distributors to publish unused delivery capacity and match compatible routes, helping reduce empty trips while keeping commercial data appropriately separated.
lookingFor: Fleet operators, logistics analysts, and route optimization engineers

title: Building maintenance transparency portal
summary: A property operations portal that converts service requests, inspection findings, vendor quotations, approvals, and completion evidence into a clear timeline for owners and tenants.
lookingFor: Property managers and maintenance service providers

title: Reusable packaging coordination service
summary: A lightweight system for restaurants, offices, and delivery partners to manage deposits, returns, cleaning cycles, and impact reporting for reusable food packaging.
lookingFor: Restaurant groups, delivery partners, and sustainability advisors
